USDT Inflows to Exchanges Reach Record High Amid Market Downturn
data.description: According to Odaily, data from IntoTheBlock reveals that $2.72 billion worth of USDT flowed into exchanges this week, marking the largest weekly net inflow since 2022. This surge appears to coincide with a recent market downturn that triggered widespread liquidations, potentially prompting traders to transfer stablecoins to exchanges to bolster collateral and safeguard leveraged positions.

data.title: Coinbase to List BERA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase will add support for Bera (BERA) on the Berachain network. Please do not send this asset through other networks, otherwise funds may be lost. Trading will begin later today if liquidity conditions are met. Once the supply of this asset is sufficient, the BERA-USD trading pair will be launched in stages. Support for BERA may be limited in some supported jurisdictions. Coinbase will add support for BERA using the "experimental" label.

data.title: Celsius Ex-CEO Alex Mashinsky's Sentencing Postponement Requested
data.description: According to Odaily, lawyers for former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky have requested a one-month delay in his sentencing, moving it from April 8, 2025, to May 8, 2025. The request was submitted to the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York. The defense aims to ensure adequate time to prepare a sentencing statement that accurately reflects Mashinsky's perspective on his criminal actions and considers various factors the court might weigh in determining an appropriate penalty. Alex Mashinsky, 59, has previously pleaded guilty to two criminal charges.

data.title: IntoTheBlock: USDT worth $2.72 billion flowed into exchanges this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to data disclosed by IntoTheBlock, US$2.72 billion worth of USDT flowed into exchanges this week, setting the largest single-week net inflow since 2022. This surge seems to coincide with the recent market decline that triggered large-scale liquidations, which may prompt traders to transfer stablecoins to exchanges to increase collateral and protect leveraged positions.
